name: Computational Cancer Cure roadmap
what_it_solves: Strategic-level roadmap situating the SL engine + RS framework within a longer-horizon 'computational cancer cure' program.
how_it_solves: 32KB narrative anchored in the CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP; connects sprint-level engine work to multi-year outcomes.
why_it_exists: Prevents the SL engine from being read as a point tool — it's positioned as one leg of a broader capability build.
